summary: Full backend + frontend testing of YOLO26 CV Platform MVP. All 16 backend API tests passed. All 5 frontend pages load correctly with proper UI structure.

issues: 5th model slot appears as empty dark card (bottom right of grid) - layout issue with 5 items in a 3-column grid

action_items: Minor: Fix Model Hub grid layout - 5 built-in models in a 3-col grid leaves an empty placeholder cell that appears as a dark box. Consider using auto-fit columns or limiting to 2 columns.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') - should use lifespan context manager (FastAPI >= 0.93)
Seed logic only checks count == 0, so if models are deleted then re-added duplicates could occur on restart - consider upsert by name
server.py is 313 lines - acceptable for MVP but consider splitting routes into separate files if expanding

success_rate.frontend: 95% (minor grid layout issue in Model Hub)

seed_data_creation: Backend startup seeds 5 default built-in model configs on first run
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP is clean. All APIs work. Landing page, Studio, Projects, Datasets, Model Hub, Results pages all load correctly. Studio shows Detection task with Ready model status and 50% confidence slider by default. TF.js inference not tested (requires browser GPU/WebGL). Model Hub has minor 5th-item grid empty cell visual issue.
